purpose.summary: This BMS map defines the 'Pending Authorization Screen' (COPAU0A) for the CardDemo application. It is used to display and potentially process pending card authorizations, showing transaction details and customer information.
purpose.business_context: This screen is likely used by customer service representatives or fraud analysts to review and manage pending credit card authorizations.

paragraphs.purpose: This paragraph defines the BMS mapset 'COPAU00'. It specifies general characteristics of the mapset, such as the control options (ALARM, FREEKB), extended attributes (EXTATT=YES), language (LANG=COBOL), mode (MODE=INOUT), storage (STORAGE=AUTO), terminal I/O area prefix (TIOAPFX=YES), and the map type (TYPE=&&SYSPARM). The mapset acts as a container for one or more BMS maps. It sets the overall environment for the maps within it. The CTRL parameter enables the alarm and allows the keyboard to be unlocked after data entry. EXTATT enables extended attributes for color and highlighting. The LANG parameter specifies COBOL as the programming language. MODE=INOUT indicates that the map can be used for both input and output. STORAGE=AUTO lets CICS manage storage allocation. TIOAPFX=YES includes a terminal I/O area prefix. TYPE=&&SYSPARM allows the map to be defined as either a map or a partition set based on the system parameter.
paragraphs.dead_code_reason: Artifact 'COPAU00' (map) is never referenced by any other artifact in the dependency graph

paragraphs.purpose: This paragraph defines the BMS map 'COPAU0A' within the 'COPAU00' mapset. It specifies the map's layout on the screen, including its position (LINE=1, COLUMN=1) and size (SIZE=(24,80)), which corresponds to a standard 24x80 terminal screen. It also defines various fields that make up the screen, such as labels, input fields, and output fields, each with specific attributes like color, highlighting, and position. The map is designed to display information related to pending authorizations, including account ID, customer name, address, transaction details, and credit/cash limits and balances. It includes an input field (ACCTID) for searching by account ID and several output fields for displaying customer and transaction data. The map also provides a selection mechanism for choosing a specific transaction from a list of pending authorizations.
